svg.title: IT Financial Lakehouse Architecture
svg.desc: Data lineage diagram showing Bronze, Silver, and Gold medallion layers feeding into a Kimball Star Schema and Power BI reporting layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a SAP GL extract look like?')
sendPrompt('What is a cloud billing export?')
sendPrompt('What cost center reference data looks like?')
sendPrompt('What ServiceNow asset data looks like?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Bronze layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Silver layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Gold Star Schema')
sendPrompt('How does Power BI connect to the Gold layer?')

svg.text: Click any layer to learn more
